name: gh-workflow
description: Issue-first GitHub workflow skill for Codex.

interface.longDescription: GH Workflow adds an issue-first GitHub workflow for initializing repositories, creating issues, branching, committing, pushing, reviewing, squash merging, and deleting merged branches with the gh CLI.
defaultPrompt: Use $gh-workflow to create an issue and branch.
Use $gh-workflow to stage, push, review, and merge.
